messages.content: Summarize applicable lessons from recent reasoning-budget and RL work for our from-scratch agent pipeline. DeepSeek-R1 (Guo et al., 2025) and Qwen3 (Qwen Team, 2025) both show that reasoning models can learn to plan before acting. For small scratch models: Hidden chain-of-thought fields are harder to supervise. Visible `plan` actions in the message stream are easier to evaluate and

</action>

messages.name: fs.read
